section_miscategorizations.text: The headache is not the worst she has experienced.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported characterization of the symptom (history of present illness), not an assessment or diagnostic synthesis.

section_miscategorizations.text: I'll also order a repeat physical exam.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The content is plan/management (an order) and belongs in P; however, the phrasing is slightly informal for a plan statement. This is an organizational/style issue rather than a true section miscategorization.
